//: Disabled hook examples preserved here so Claude Code doesn't load them. To enable one, copy its entry into the `hooks` block of settings.json (and drop the `//example-` prefix from this file's keys if you copy the whole block).
//example-PostToolUse-pytest: Run pytest for the touched module when a test file is edited.

hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$f = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path; if ($f -match 'test_.*\.py$|.*_test\.py$' -and (Get-Command pytest -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { pytest -q $f 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30 }"

//example-UserPromptSubmit-git: Inject git status into every prompt.

hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path .git) { Write-Output '<git>'; git status --short; Write-Output '---'; git log --oneline -5; Write-Output '</git>' }"

//example-Stop-notify: Toast notification when Claude finishes a turn.
